type: CLOSEOUT MEMO (human-readable record; NOT a new backtest)
branch: Frozen Donchian NQ-only daily baseline discovery branch

s23_chain_summary.D13: Transcoded local Databento-native NQ 2014-2022 into module-local daily CSVs (IS data prep).
s23_chain_summary.D14: Ran the frozen daily Donchian baseline over the full 2013-2022 IS window (continuous stream).
s23_chain_summary.D15: Pre-registered the OOS validation protocol and COMMITTED it (18349fa) BEFORE any OOS data was seen.
s23_chain_summary.D16: Transcoded sealed 2023-2025 OOS data into daily CSVs; all years structural-QA PASS.
s23_chain_summary.D17: Ran the frozen Donchian engine exactly ONCE over 2023-2025 and judged strictly against D15.

verdict_reason: Every economic gate is green (expectancy > 0, PF > 1.05, max DD within 1.5x IS, >= 1 positive year, no >80% single-trade dominance, no data defect), and no FAIL trigger fires. But the committed protocol's WATCH trigger 'OOS trade count too small for confidence' is live at n=16, which holds the verdict at WATCH under the FAIL->WATCH->PASS precedence.
what_watch_means: Do not add filters using 2023-2025 data.
correct_next_steps: S24 entry-rule significance on the frozen signals (signal_significance, currently parked).
Wider evidence base / multi-market test (fresh future OOS, not re-using 2023-2025).
anti_overfit_warning: Promising but still fragile: low OOS trade count (n=16) and a trend-follower profile whose net result leans on a few large winners (best trade = 50.3% of OOS net). Do not over-read three strong OOS years.
final_line: S23 is complete as a frozen Donchian baseline discovery branch. It produced a WATCH candidate, NOT a deployable strategy.
